title: Date-Night American Ikura Roast
description: A romantic and flavorful dish featuring ikura, roast, and herbal notes, perfect for a date night in. This ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly recipe combines the best of American cuisine with a touch of Japanese elegance.

ingredients.name: Roasting Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Carrots, Brussels sprouts, red bell pepper

instructions: Season the lamb rack with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
In a large bowl, toss the roasting vegetables with coconut oil, thyme, and a pinch of salt.
Place the lamb rack on a roasting pan and surround with the vegetables.
Drizzle the ikura with lime juice and sprinkle with sea salt.
Roast in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until the lamb reaches 135°F (57°C) for medium-rare.
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the lamb with ikura, roasted vegetables, and a side of quinoa or rice.
